title: Archived Consultation - Revised Monograph (Multi-Vitamin/Mineral Supplements) - Canada.ca
content:
## Archived Consultation - Revised Monograph (Multi-Vitamin/Mineral Supplements)

### Notice to the reader:
The online consultation is now closed. Comments and suggestions received during the public consultation period are being considered. Thank you for your input.
The Natural and Non-prescription Health Products Directorate (NNHPD) is seeking your feedback on the revised monograph for Multi-vitamin/mineral supplements. The revised monograph is available as follows:
- Multi-Vitamin/Mineral Supplements [2016-02-09]
This consultation is open for comment from February 9 until March 9, 2016 .
For any comments being submitted, it is requested that references to applicable scientific literature be included for verification purposes. Please submit your comments by visiting our " Contact Us " page.

## Reporting to Canadians
All comments received during the consultation period will be considered prior to finalizing the pre-cleared information. Once finalized, the new monograph will be available in the Natural Health Products Ingredients Database (NHPID).
As always, companies can choose to comply with the monographs or apply outside the scope of these documents by providing additional evidence to support the safety and efficacy of their products.
